Rectangular Mesh Filter for Nail Dust Collector
products.body_html:
The essential replacement filter for a clean and efficient nail workspace.

Keep your nail dust collector performing at its best with this rectangular mesh replacement filter. Designed to trap fine nail dust and filing particles, it ensures optimal suction power and a healthier working environment for both nail technicians and clients.

Key Features

  • Dimensions: 17 × 13 cm
  • Thickness: 0.8 cm
  • Compatible with select nail dust collector models (see image)
  • Fine rectangular mesh design for maximum dust filtration
  • Easy to remove, clean and replace
  • Ideal for professional nail salons and home use

Replace regularly for optimal suction and hygiene.

Clear Drawer Organizer Set | 4 Sizes (S+M+L+XL) | Makeup & Home Storage
products.body_html:
Finally, a drawer that works for you — not against you.

This set of 4 clear acrylic drawer organizers is the simplest way to bring order to any drawer at home. With four different sizes (S, M, L and XL) included in one pack, you can mix, match and arrange them to perfectly fit your drawer layout. Ideal for organizing makeup, nail tools, jewellery, office supplies, kitchen utensils and more. Clean, minimal design that blends into any interior.

Key Features

  • Set of 4 organizers — S, M, L and XL sizes included
  • Crystal-clear acrylic — see your items at a glance
  • Modular design — mix and match to fit any drawer size
  • Smooth rounded edges — no scratching inside your drawer
  • Lightweight and easy to remove for cleaning
  • Perfect for makeup, nail tools, jewellery, stationery and kitchen drawers
  • Minimalist design — suits any home or salon aesthetic

Whether you're organising your makeup collection, nail tech tools, office desk or kitchen drawer — this set gives you the flexibility to create a perfectly tailored storage solution.

One set. Every drawer. Total order.

Artis Palm Brush | Luxury Foundation & Powder Brush | Gold Edition
products.body_html:
The ultimate makeup brush reimagined — designed to fit your hand, not just hold it.

This iconic palm-grip brush from Artis redefines the way you apply foundation, powder and skincare products. Its unique dome-shaped gold handle fits perfectly in the palm of your hand, allowing natural, fluid brush strokes with zero wrist strain. The ultra-soft synthetic fibres blend seamlessly into the skin for a flawless, airbrushed finish every time. Elegant, ergonomic and built to perform.

Key Features

  • Unique palm-grip dome handle — ergonomic gold & white design
  • Ultra-soft synthetic fibres — skin-friendly and cruelty-free
  • Ideal for liquid foundation, powder, blush and skincare application
  • Delivers a seamless, airbrushed finish with minimal product waste
  • Ergonomic design reduces hand and wrist fatigue during application
  • Easy to clean — fibres dry quickly and maintain their shape
  • Luxury gold and white finish — a statement piece for any vanity

Perfect for makeup artists, beauty enthusiasts and anyone who wants a professional, streak-free finish at home. A true game-changer in your makeup routine.

Hold it differently. Apply it perfectly.

products.title: Nail Glue Dot Stickers | 100 Dots
products.body_html:
Quick, clean and mess-free nail application — no glue needed.

These self-adhesive nail glue dot stickers are the perfect alternative to traditional nail glue for applying press-on nails, nail tips and nail art accessories. Simply peel and press for an instant, secure hold that is gentle on the natural nail. Ideal for temporary wear, special occasions or clients who prefer a damage-free option.

Key Features

  • Self-adhesive double-sided tabs — no liquid glue needed
  • Strong hold — secure fit for press-on nails and nail tips
  • Gentle on natural nails — no damage on removal
  • Quick and easy application — peel, press, done
  • Mess-free and beginner friendly
  • Multiple sheets included — large quantity pack
  • Suitable for all nail sizes

Perfect for nail techs, press-on nail lovers and clients looking for a quick, reusable and damage-free nail application method.

Perfect nails, zero mess.

products.title: Nail Tips for Professional Nail Gel Color Chart 120 pieces
Professional LED UV Nail Lamp | Standing Arm | Digital Display
products.body_html:
Salon-grade curing power in a sleek, adjustable standing design.

This professional LED UV nail lamp combines powerful curing performance with a flexible articulated arm and a stable weighted base. The built-in digital display allows precise control of curing time, making it ideal for nail techs who demand consistency and efficiency during every session. Compatible with all UV and LED gel formulas.

Key Features

  • Powerful LED UV lamp — fast and even curing
  • Flexible articulated arm — fully adjustable for any working angle
  • Stable weighted base — no tipping, no movement during use
  • Built-in digital display — easy timer control
  • Multiple timer settings for precise curing
  • Compatible with all UV & LED gel polishes and builder gels
  • Sleek white design — professional salon aesthetic

Perfect for nail technicians, beauty salons and home nail studios looking for a reliable, adjustable curing lamp with a clean professional finish.

Precision curing, elevated.

⚠️ Warning – Safety

Never look directly at the UV LED lamp while it is on. This lamp emits UV-A rays (long wavelength) which can damage the retina and eyes upon direct or repeated exposure. Keep out of reach of children. For prolonged use, wear UV-protective glasses.

products.title: Nail Art Stamp Set | 30 Designs | Flowers, Patterns
products.body_html:
Create stunning nail art designs in seconds — no freehand skills required.

This professional nail stamping set includes 30 individual stamp heads featuring a wide variety of motifs: flowers, butterflies, geometric patterns, hearts, leaves and more. Perfect for nail techs and nail art enthusiasts looking to add intricate designs quickly and effortlessly onto any nail surface — gel, acrylic or natural nails.

Key Features

  • Set of 30 stamp heads — wide variety of designs
  • Motifs include flowers, butterflies, hearts, geometric and botanical patterns
  • Compatible with nail stamping polish and gel
  • Easy to use — press, stamp, done
  • Reusable and easy to clean
  • Stored in a resealable zip bag for easy organisation
  • Suitable for gel, acrylic and natural nails

Ideal for nail techs, nail art lovers and beauty professionals looking to offer unique, detailed designs with minimal effort.

Infinite creativity, one stamp at a time.

products.title: Professional Round-Tip Tweezers | Stainless Steel
products.body_html:
Gentle precision for flawless brow shaping and sensitive skin care.

These professional stainless steel tweezers feature a smooth rounded tip designed for safe, comfortable hair removal without any risk of scratching or irritating the skin. Lightweight, durable, and easy to sterilize — perfect for salon use, nail tech kits, or at-home beauty routines.

Key Features

  • Stainless steel — rust-resistant, strong and long-lasting
  • Smooth rounded tip — gentle on skin, no scratching risk
  • Firm grip for precise and controlled hair removal
  • Lightweight ergonomic design for comfortable use
  • Easy to disinfect — salon safe
  • Slim compact design — ideal for travel kits or pro cases

Ideal for brow grooming, sensitive skin care, and everyday hair removal. A safe and reliable essential in every beauty kit.

Soft touch, precise results.

products.title: Professional Cuticle Scissors | High-Precision Stainless Steel Blade
products.body_html:
Designed for nail technicians who demand precision — every cut, every time.

These professional-grade cuticle scissors are crafted for nail techs and beauty professionals who refuse to compromise on quality. Made from high-carbon stainless steel with ergonomic finger loops, they deliver flawless cuticle trimming, clean nail shaping, and fine detail work with unmatched control. Whether you're prepping for gel, capsule application, or nail art — built for accuracy and durability, session after session.

Key Features

  • High-carbon stainless steel blade — rust-resistant & ultra-sharp
  • Micro-precision tip for clean cuticle and hangnail removal
  • Ergonomic rounded finger loops for comfort during long sessions
  • Smooth, self-sharpening pivot action
  • Compact size — ideal for detail work and nail art finishing
  • Hygienic, easy-to-sterilize surface — salon safe
  • Supplied in protective blister packaging

Perfect for cuticle work, gel prep, nail art finishing, and everyday nail maintenance. A must-have in every professional nail kit.

Precision that speaks for itself.

products.title: Stone Warmer for Massage (22 pcs) & Stone Heater in Aluminum Case
products.body_html:
Enhance your spa, wellness center, or home relaxation experience with this Premium Heated Stone Massage Set. Designed for professionals and enthusiasts alike, this set offers:

  • 22 High-Quality Basalt Stones – Retain heat efficiently for longer, deeper relaxation
  • Aluminum Heating Case – Elegant, lightweight, and portable for mobile therapists
  • Multiple Stone Sizes – Perfect for targeted massage on different body areas
  • Pre-heating Function – Integrated heating system for quick & effortless stone warming
  • Ideal for Hot Stone Therapy – Improves circulation, reduces muscle tension, and enhances relaxation

Whether you're a professional masseur or seeking deep relaxation at home, this stone heater set is a must-have.

📦 Includes: 22 basalt stones, aluminum heating case, power cable.

products.title: Makeup/Nail UV Organizer
products.body_html:
All-in-one portable organizer perfect for makeup lovers and nail enthusiasts. Features a built-in UV LED nail lamp compartment, multi-tier removable trays, and dedicated storage for brushes, gel pots, glitters, tools, and accessories. Compact, lightweight, and ideal for home, travel, or salon use.

Key Features:

  • Integrated UV/LED nail lamp storage for quick gel curing
  • Multiple stackable trays and compartments for organized storage
  • Space for makeup brushes, palettes, gel polish jars, rhinestones & more
  • Removable dividers for customizable layout
  • Portable carry handle and secure lid
  • Durable, easy-to-clean design

Combine your makeup essentials and nail art supplies in one stylish, functional case – no more scattered tools!

Perfect for: At-home manicures, travel, professional nail techs, and beauty organization.

products.body_html:
20-Piece Professional Makeup Brush Set

Complete your makeup routine with this versatile 20-piece brush collection. Designed for flawless application, blending, and precision, this set includes essential tools for face, eyes, brows, and lips. Crafted with high-quality synthetic bristles that are soft, cruelty-free, and easy to clean.

What's Included:

  • 1. Foundation Brush
  • 2. Eyebrow Brush
  • 3. Flat-Top Shadow Brush
  • 4. Eyeshadow Brush
  • 5. Eyeshadow Brush
  • 6. Round Blooming Brush
  • 7. Eyebrow Brush
  • 8. Eyeshadow Brush + Ultra Fine Eyeliner
  • 9. Eyeshadow Brush + Eyeshadow Sponge
  • 10. Eyeshadow Brush + Eyebrow Brush
  • 11. Mascara Brush
  • 12. Eyeshadow Brush
  • 13. Lip Brush
  • 14. Eyeliner Brush
  • 15. Angle Top Brush
  • 16. Ultra Fine Eyeliner
  • 17. Eyeshadow Brush
  • 18. Eyeliner Brush
  • 19. Eyeshadow Sponge
  • 20. Concealer Brush

Key Features:

  • High-density synthetic bristles for smooth, streak-free application
  • Multi-functional design – perfect for beginners and pros
  • Strong powder pickup and even blending
  • Durable ferrules and comfortable handles
  • Easy to clean and maintain
  • Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly

Whether you're creating everyday looks or full glam, this all-in-one set has every brush you need in one compact collection.

Ideal for: Daily use, travel, makeup artists, beauty enthusiasts, and gift giving.

products.title: Portable Professional Aluminum Nail Station | Black
products.body_html:
Ultimate Black Nail Technician Station

The all-in-one dream workstation for professional nail artists & mobile techs

Transform your nail game with this luxurious, portable Black station designed for pros!

  • Extra-large extendable workspace – ideal for detailed nail art, manicure & pedicure services
  • Holds hundreds of nail polishes in visible, tiered compartments for quick selection
  • Multiple deep drawers for gel polishes, acrylics, powders, e-files, tips, files, cuticle tools & gems
  • Built-in Bluetooth speakers – play relaxing music or your vibe playlist during sessions
  • Large central mirror + foldable LED-lit mirror for precision work & client previews
  • Premium Black aluminum case – lightweight, durable & perfect for mobile nail techs, events, weddings & pop-ups
  • Secure locks & reinforced edges – travel-ready without compromise

Make every appointment feel like a luxury spa experience — organized, fun & totally Insta-worthy! 💅✨
